title: Enumerate serve.py API routes for proto mapping

I have enough information now. Here is the complete enumeration of all API routes, grouped by service area:

## Congress System

**`POST /api/congress/start`**
- Auth: localhost or cookie
- Body: `{ topic: string, discord_user?: string }`
- Response: `{ session_id: "congress-NNNN", session_number: int }`
- Creates a new session JSON file with a roster snapshot. No streaming.

**`POST /api/congress`**
